sectiondef.header: Clock Wizard register offsets and default values

briefdescription.para: Software reset offset.
Software reset value.
Status register offset.
Interrupt status register offset.
Interrupt enable register offset.
Reconfiguration register offset.
Reconfiguration trigger value.
ClkOut0 register 1 offset.
ClkOut0 register 2 offset.
ClkOut0 register 3 offset.
ClkOut0 register 4 offset.
Divider register offset.
Divider register 2 offset.
ClkOut0 register 11 offset.
ClkOut0 register 11 default value.
Filter register offset.
Filter register default value.
Lock register 1 offset.
Lock register 1 default value.
Lock register 2 offset.
Lock register 2 default value.
Lock register 3 offset.
Lock register 3 default value.
Power register offset.
FBout register offset.
FBout register 2 offset.
FBout register 2 default value.
8.1 Gbps configuration values
Reg3 config for 8.1 Gbps.
Reg4 config for 8.1 Gbps.
Reg11 config for 8.1 Gbps.
Reg15 config for 8.1 Gbps.
Reg17 config for 8.1 Gbps.
Primary low config for 8.1 Gbps.
Primary high config for 8.1 Gbps.
Secondary low config for 8.1 Gbps.
Secondary high config for 8.1 Gbps.
5.4 Gbps configuration values
Reg3 config for 5.4 Gbps.
Reg4 config for 5.4 Gbps.
Reg11 config for 5.4 Gbps.
Reg15 config for 5.4 Gbps.
Reg17 config for 5.4 Gbps.
Primary low config for 5.4 Gbps.
Primary high config for 5.4 Gbps.
Secondary low config for 5.4 Gbps.
Secondary high config for 5.4 Gbps.
2.7 Gbps configuration values
Reg3 config for 2.7 Gbps.
Reg4 config for 2.7 Gbps.
Reg11 config for 2.7 Gbps.
Reg15 config for 2.7 Gbps.
Reg17 config for 2.7 Gbps.
Primary low config for 2.7 Gbps.
Primary high config for 2.7 Gbps.
Secondary low config for 2.7 Gbps.
Secondary high config for 2.7 Gbps.
1.62 Gbps configuration values
Reg3 config for 1.62 Gbps.
Reg4 config for 1.62 Gbps.
Reg11 config for 1.62 Gbps.
Reg15 config for 1.62 Gbps.
Reg17 config for 1.62 Gbps.
Primary low config for 1.62 Gbps.
Primary high config for 1.62 Gbps.
Secondary low config for 1.62 Gbps.
Secondary high config for 1.62 Gbps.

sectiondef.header: Clock Wizard control bit masks and shift values

briefdescription.para: Clock lock status bit.
ClkOut0 reg3 pre-divide by 2.
ClkOut0 reg3 used bit.
ClkOut0 reg3 MX bit.
FBout reg1 pre-divide by 2.
FBout enable bit.
FBout MX bit.
Reconfiguration load trigger.
Reconfiguration start address.
FBout reg1 edge mask.
ClkOut0 pre-divide by 2 shift.
ClkOut0 MX shift.
ClkOut0 phase5 enable shift.
ClkOut0 phase5 falling edge shift.
Divider edge shift.
MMCM multiplier for 405 MHz (8.1 Gbps link rate)
MMCM multiplier for 270 MHz (5.4 Gbps link rate)
MMCM multiplier for 135 MHz (2.7 Gbps link rate)
MMCM multiplier for 81 MHz (1.62 Gbps link rate)
MMCM divider value for all link rates.
A generic EDID (Extended Display Identification Data) structure.

detaileddescription.para: This array contains a default 128-byte EDID configuration for display capability.

briefdescription.para: A generic DPCD (DisplayPort Configuration Data) structure.

detaileddescription.para: This array contains default DPCD register values.

briefdescription.para: DisplayPort RX subcores instance array.

detaileddescription.para: This array contains the subcore configuration for all DisplayPort RX subsystem instances.

briefdescription.para: Input Operations.
Output Operations.
This macro reads a value from a DisplayPort Receiver Subsystem register.

detaileddescription.para: A 32 bit read is performed. If the component is implemented in a smaller width, only the least significant data is read from the register. The most significant data will be read as 0.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the XDpRxSs core instance.
is the register offset of the register (defined at the top of this file).

simplesect.para: C-style signature: u32 XDpRxSs_ReadReg(UINTPTR BaseAddress, u32 RegOffset)

briefdescription.para: This macro writes a value to a DisplayPort Receiver Subsystem register.

detaileddescription.para: A 32 bit write is performed. If the component is implemented in a smaller width, only the least significant data is written.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the XDpRxSs core instance.
is the register offset of the register (defined at the top of this file) to be written.
is the 32-bit value to write into the register.

simplesect.para: C-style signature: void XDpRxSs_WriteReg(UINTPTR BaseAddress, u32 RegOffset, u32 Data)

briefdescription.para: No content protection.
HDCP 1.4.
HDCP 2.2.
Both HDCP 1.4 and 2.2.
These constants specify the HDCP protection schemes.
Video mode change event interrupt type for DisplayPort core.
Power state change interrupt type for DisplayPort core.
No video event interrupt type for DisplayPort core.
Vertical blanking event interrupt type for DisplayPort core.
Training lost event interrupt type for DisplayPort core.
Valid video event interrupt type for DisplayPort core.
Info packet event interrupt type for DisplayPort core.
Extension packet event interrupt type for DisplayPort core.
Training done event interrupt type for DisplayPort core.
Bandwidth change event interrupt type for DisplayPort core.
Down request event interrupt type for DisplayPort core.
Down reply event interrupt type for DisplayPort core.
Audio packet overflow event interrupt type for DisplayPort core.
Payload allocation event interrupt type for DisplayPort core.
ACT sequence received event interrupt type for DisplayPort core.
CRC test start event interrupt type for DisplayPort core.
Unplug event type for DisplayPort RX Subsystem.
Link BW event type for DisplayPort RX Subsystem.
PLL reset event type for DisplayPort RX Subsystem.
Drv power state change interrupt type for DisplayPort core.
Drv Valid video event interrupt type for DisplayPort core.
Drv No video event interrupt type for DisplayPort core.
Drv Access lane set interrupt type for DisplayPort core.
Drv Access link qual interrupt type for DisplayPort core.
Drv Access error counter interrupt type for DisplayPort core.
Vertical blanking event for stream 2 interrupt type for DisplayPort core.
Vertical blanking event for stream 3 interrupt type for DisplayPort core.
Vertical blanking event for stream 4 interrupt type for DisplayPort core.
Adaptive sync SDP packet event for stream 1 DisplayPort core.
Adaptive sync SDP packet event for stream 2 DisplayPort core.
Adaptive sync SDP packet event for stream 3 DisplayPort core.
Adaptive sync SDP packet event for stream 4 DisplayPort core.
Adaptive sync vblank event for stream 1 DisplayPort core.
Adaptive sync vblank event for stream 2 DisplayPort core.
Adaptive sync vblank event for stream 3 DisplayPort core.
Adaptive sync vblank event for stream 4 DisplayPort core.
Video mode change event interrupt type for stream 2 DisplayPort core.
Video mode change event interrupt type for stream 3 DisplayPort core.
Video mode change event interrupt type for stream 4 DisplayPort core.
No video event interrupt type for stream 2 DisplayPort core.
No video event interrupt type for stream 3 DisplayPort core.
No video event interrupt type for stream 4 DisplayPort core.
Valid video event interrupt type for stream 2 DisplayPort core.
Valid video event interrupt type for stream 3 DisplayPort core.
Valid video event interrupt type for stream 4 DisplayPort core.
Info packet event interrupt type for stream 2 DisplayPort core.
Info packet event interrupt type for stream 3 DisplayPort core.
Info packet event interrupt type for stream 4 DisplayPort core.
Extension packet event interrupt type for stream 2 DisplayPort core.
Extension packet event interrupt type for stream 3 DisplayPort core.
Extension packet event interrupt type for stream 4 DisplayPort core.
These constants specify different types of handler and used to differentiate interrupt requests from sub-cores.
Callback type which represents the handler for events.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function reports list of cores included in DisplayPort RX Subsystem.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function sets up the downstream topology that will be used by the DisplayPort RX to respond to down requests coming from the TX.

listitem.para: Sinks equal to number of streams (each with its own global unique identifier) are exposed to LINK_ADDRESS sideband messages.

The extended display identification data (EDID) will be set to a generic EDID (GenEdid) for each of the sinks. REMOTE_I2C_READ sideband messages on address 0x50 will be replied to with the contents set by XDp_RxSetIicMapEntry for 0x50.
REMOTE_DPCD_READ sideband messages will be responded to with the contents set for the sink using XDp_RxSetDpcdMap. All sinks are given the a generic DPCD (GenDpcd).
ENUM_PATH_RESOURCES sideband messages will be responded to with the value set by XDp_RxMstSetPbn (or 0 if the sink already has a stream allocated to it).

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance.

briefdescription.para: This routine is a stub for the asynchronous training pattern 1 interrupt callback.

detaileddescription.para: On initialization, training pattern 1 interrupt handler is set to this callback. It is considered as an training pattern 1 for this handler to be invoked.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance.

briefdescription.para: This routine is a stub for the asynchronous training pattern 2 interrupt callback.

detaileddescription.para: On initialization, training pattern 2 interrupt handler is set to this callback. It is considered as an training pattern 2 for this handler to be invoked.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance.

briefdescription.para: This routine is a stub for the asynchronous unplug interrupt callback.

detaileddescription.para: On initialization, unplug interrupt handler is set to this callback. It is considered as an unplug for this handler to be invoked.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance.

briefdescription.para: This routine is a stub for the asynchronous access lane set interrupt callback.

detaileddescription.para: On initialization, access lane set interrupt handler is set to this callback.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function configures the Clock Wizard to generate the receiver decode clock (rx_dec_clk) for 8b10b logic based on the current link rate.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function initializes the DisplayPort Receiver Subsystem core.

detaileddescription.para: This function must be called prior to using the core. Initialization of the core includes setting up the instance data and ensuring the hardware is in a quiescent state.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance.
points to the configuration structure associated with the DisplayPort RX Subsystem core.
is the base address of the device. If address translation is being used, then this parameter must reflect the virtual base address. Otherwise, the physical address should be used.

briefdescription.para: This function resets the DisplayPort Receiver Subsystem including all sub-cores.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance.

simplesect.para: IIC needs to be reinitialized after reset.

briefdescription.para: This function starts the DisplayPort Receiver Subsystem including all sub-cores.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS, if DP RX Subsystem and its included sub-cores configured successfully.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the data rate to be used by the DisplayPort RX Subsystem core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

is the rate at which link needs to be driven.
XDPRXSS_LINK_BW_SET_162GBPS = 0x06(for a 1.62 Gbps data rate)
XDPRXSS_LINK_BW_SET_270GBPS = 0x0A(for a 2.70 Gbps data rate)
XDPRXSS_LINK_BW_SET_540GBPS = 0x14(for a 5.40 Gbps data rate)

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if setting the new lane rate was successful.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the number of lanes to be used by DisplayPort RX Subsystem core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

is the number of lanes to be used.
1 = XDPRXSS_LANE_COUNT_SET_1
2 = XDPRXSS_LANE_COUNT_SET_2
4 = XDPRXSS_LANE_COUNT_SET_4

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if setting the new lane count was successful.

briefdescription.para: This function allows the user to select number of ports to be exposed when replying to a LINK_ADDRESS sideband message and hides rest of the ports.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance.
specifies the number of ports to be exposed within the range 1 to 4.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE, if exposing ports which are already exposed or ports are exceeding total number of stream supported by the system.

simplesect.para: Number of ports are equal to number of streams.

briefdescription.para: This function checks if the receiver's DisplayPort Configuration Data (DPCD) indicates that the receiver has achieved clock recovery, channel equalization, symbol lock, and interlane alignment for all lanes currently in use.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if the RX device has achieved clock recovery, channel equalization, symbol lock, and interlane alignment.
XST_DEVICE_NOT_FOUND if no RX device is connected.

briefdescription.para: This function configures the number of pixels output through the user data interface.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance.
is the user pixel width to be configured.

briefdescription.para: This function extracts the bits per color from MISC0 or VSC SDP packet based on whether reception of colorimetry information through VSC SDP packets or through MISC registers of the stream.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance.
is the stream number to make the calculations for.

simplesect.para: The bits per color for the stream.

briefdescription.para: This function extracts the color component format from MISC0 or VSC SDP packet based on whether reception of colorimetry information through VSC SDP packets or through MISC registers of the stream.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance.
is the stream number to make the calculations for.

simplesect.para: The color component for the stream.

briefdescription.para: This function extracts the YCbCrColorimetry from MISC0 or VSC SDP packet based on whether reception of colorimetry information through VSC SDP packets or through MISC registers of the stream.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance.
is the stream number to make the calculations for.

simplesect.para: The colorimetry format for the stream.

briefdescription.para: This function extracts the dynamic range from MISC0 or VSC SDP packet based on whether reception of colorimetry information through VSC SDP packets or through MISC registers of the stream.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance.
is the stream number to make the calculations for.

simplesect.para: The dynamic range value for the stream.

briefdescription.para: This function handles incoming sideband messages.

detaileddescription.para: It will 1) Read the contents of the down request registers, 2) Delegate control depending on the request type, and 3) Send a down reply.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if the entire message was sent successfully.
XST_DEVICE_NOT_FOUND if no device is connected.
XST_ERROR_COUNT_MAX if sending one of the message fragments timed out.

briefdescription.para: This routine initializes the MCDP6000 part on the VFMC card used for DP 1.4.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function sets Adaptive-Sync capabilities to DisplayPort RX Subsystem.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.
is to enable/disable the Adaptive-Sync capabilities in DisplayPort Rx Subsystem

briefdescription.para: This function masks the Adaptive-Sync interrupts from DisplayPort RX Subsystem.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.
Interrupts to mask

briefdescription.para: This function unmasks Adaptive-Sync interrupt from DisplayPort RX Subsystem.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.
Interrupts to unmask

briefdescription.para: This function retrieves the current vblank value of the incoming video stream.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance.
Stream is the stream number to get the vblank.

simplesect.para: This function has to be called after assertion of Bit-30 of XDP_RX_INTERRUPT_CAUSE_2 register

briefdescription.para: This function retrieves the current VTotal value of the incoming video stream.

detaileddescription.para:
InstancePtr
is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance.
Stream
Stream is the stream number to get the vtotal.
Note: This function has to be called after assertion Bit-30 of XDP_RX_INTERRUPT_CAUSE_2 register

simplesect.para: This function has to be called after assertion of Bit-30 of XDP_RX_INTERRUPT_CAUSE_2 register

briefdescription.para: This function resets the Clock Wizard and waits for it to lock after the receiver decode clock has been reconfigured.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if the Clock Wizard locked successfully.
XST_FAILURE if the Clock Wizard failed to lock within the retry limit.

briefdescription.para: This function returns a reference to an XDpRxSs_Config structure based on the core id, DeviceId.

detaileddescription.para: The return value will refer to an entry in the device configuration table defined in the xdprxss_g.c file.

parameterdescription.para: is the unique core ID of the XDpRxSs core for the lookup operation.

simplesect.para: XDpRxSs_LookupConfig returns a reference to a config record in the configuration table (in xdprxss_g.c) corresponding to DeviceId, or NULL if no match is found.

briefdescription.para: This function returns the Index number of config table using BaseAddress.

parameterdescription.para: address of the instance

simplesect.para: Index number of the config table

briefdescription.para: This function reports list of sub-cores included in DisplayPort RX Subsystem.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function prints the link status, selected resolution, link rate /lane count symbol error.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function prints the current main stream attributes from the DisplayPort RX core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function prints the debug display info of the HDCP interface.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function performs self test on DisplayPort Receiver Subsystem sub-cores.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance.

listitem.para: Otherwise, prints self test failed message.

briefdescription.para: This function is the interrupt handler for the DisplayPort RX core operating in RX mode.

detaileddescription.para: The application is responsible for connecting this function to the interrupt system. Application beyond this driver is also responsible for providing callbacks to handle interrupts and installing the callbacks using XDpRxSs_SetCallBack() during initialization phase.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance that just interrupted.

briefdescription.para: This function installs an asynchronous callback function for the given HandlerType:

para.preformatted: HandlerType Callback Function Type ---------------------------------------- ----------------------------------- XDPRXSS_HANDLER_DP_VM_CHG_EVENT XDp_RxSetIntrVmChangeHandler XDPRXSS_HANDLER_DP_PWR_CHG_EVENT XDp_RxSetIntrPowerStateHandler XDPRXSS_HANDLER_DP_NO_VID_EVENT XDp_RxSetIntrNoVideoHandler XDPRXSS_HANDLER_DP_VBLANK_EVENT XDp_RxSetIntrVBlankHandler XDPRXSS_HANDLER_DP_TLOST_EVENT XDp_RxSetIntrTrainingLostHandler XDPRXSS_HANDLER_DP_VID_EVENT XDp_RxSetIntrVideoHandler XDPRXSS_HANDLER_DP_INFO_PKT_EVENT XDp_RxSetIntrInfoPktHandler XDPRXSS_HANDLER_DP_EXT_PKT_EVENT XDp_RxSetIntrExtPktHandler XDPRXSS_HANDLER_DP_TDONE_EVENT XDp_RxSetIntrTrainingDoneHandler XDPRXSS_HANDLER_DP_BW_CHG_EVENT XDp_RxSetIntrBwChangeHandler XDPRXSS_HANDLER_DP_DWN_REQ_EVENT XDp_RxSetIntrDownReqHandler XDPRXSS_HANDLER_DP_DWN_REP_EVENT XDp_RxSetIntrDownReplyHandler XDPRXSS_HANDLER_DP_AUD_OVRFLW_EVENT XDp_RxSetIntrAudioOverHandler XDPRXSS_HANDLER_DP_PAYLOAD_ALLOC_EVENT XDp_RxSetIntrPayloadAllocHandler XDPRXSS_HANDLER_DP_ACT_RX_EVENT XDp_RxSetIntrActRxHandler XDPRXSS_HANDLER_DP_CRC_TEST_EVENT XDp_RxSetIntrCrcTestHandler XDPRXSS_HANDLER_HDCP_RPTR_TDSA_EVENT XHdcp1x_SetCallBack XDPRXSS_HANDLER_UNPLUG_EVENT UnplugCallback XDPRXSS_HANDLER_LINKBW_EVENT LinkBwCallback XDPRXSS_HANDLER_PLL_RESET_EVENT PllResetCallback

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance.
specifies the type of handler.
is the address of the callback function.
is a user data item that will be passed to the callback function when it is invoked.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if callback function installed successfully.

simplesect.para: Invoking this function for a handler that already has been installed replaces it with the new handler.

briefdescription.para: This function installs a custom delay/sleep function to be used by the DisplayPort RX Subsystem.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance.
is the address to the callback function.
is the user data item (microseconds to delay) that will be passed to the custom sleep/delay function when it is invoked.

briefdescription.para: This function is the interrupt handler for No Video.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance that just interrupted.

briefdescription.para: This function is for the video interrupt handler.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance that just interrupted.

briefdescription.para: This function is for the power change interrupt handler.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance that just interrupted.

briefdescription.para: This function reads a single 32b word from the MCDP6000 device.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance.
is the 7-bit I2C slave address.
is the 16-bit register address.

memberdef.argsstring: (XDpRxSs *DpRxSsPtr, u8 I2CSlaveAddress, u16 RegisterAddress, u32 Value)
memberdef.name: XDpRxSs_MCDP6000_SetRegister

briefdescription.para: This function writes a single 32b word to the MCDP6000 device.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance.
is the 7-bit I2C slave address.
is the 16-bit register address.
is the 32b word to write

memberdef.argsstring: (XDpRxSs *DpRxSsPtr, u8 I2CSlaveAddress, u16 RegisterAddress, u32 Value, u32 Mask)
memberdef.name: XDpRxSs_MCDP6000_ModifyRegister

briefdescription.para: This function modifies a single 32b word from the MCDP6000 device.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance.
is the 7-bit I2C slave address.
is the 16-bit register address.
is the 32b word to write
is the 32b mask

briefdescription.para: This function initializes the MCDP6000 device with default values for DP use with the Video FMC.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance.
is the 7-bit I2C slave address.

briefdescription.para: This function initializes the MCDP6000 device with default values for IBERT use with the Video FMC.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance.
is the 7-bit I2C slave address.

briefdescription.para: This function requests a reset of the CR path of the MCDP6000 device.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance.
is the 7-bit I2C slave address.

briefdescription.para: This function requests a reset of the DP path of the MCDP6000 device.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance.
is the 7-bit I2C slave address.

briefdescription.para: This function enables the PRBS7 output of the MCDP6000 device.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance.
is the 7-bit I2C slave address.

briefdescription.para: This function enables the PRBS7 counter mode in MC Rx path Used in DP PHY compliance mode.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance.
is the 7-bit I2C slave address.

briefdescription.para: This function Disables the PRBS7 counter mode in MC Rx path Used in DP PHY compliance mode.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance.
is the 7-bit I2C slave address.

briefdescription.para: This function enables symbol counter.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance.
is the 7-bit I2C slave address.

briefdescription.para: This function clears symbol counter.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance.
is the 7-bit I2C slave address.

briefdescription.para: This function reads error counters for all lanes.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance.
is the 7-bit I2C slave address.

briefdescription.para: This function displays a registerdump of the MCDP6000 device.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance.
is the 7-bit I2C slave address.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the transparent mode of the MCDP6000 device.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance.
is the 7-bit I2C slave address.

briefdescription.para: This function changes the bandwidth of the MCDP6000 device.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance.
is the 7-bit I2C slave address.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the access lane register of the MCDP6000 device.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance.
is the 7-bit I2C slave address.

briefdescription.para: EDID IIC slave address.
Clock Wizard primary low offset.
Clock Wizard primary high offset.
Clock Wizard secondary low offset.
Clock Wizard secondary high offset.
Max retries for clock lock status.
Wait time in microseconds between retries.
Prevent circular inclusions by using protection macros.
Callback type which represents a custom timer wait handler.
This function macro enables the display timing generator (DTG).

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function macro disables the display timing generator (DTG).

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function macro enables audio stream packets on the main link.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function macro disables audio stream packets on the main link.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function macro resets the reception of audio stream packets on the main link.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function macro enables MST audio on a given stream on the main link.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance.
to be enabled audio

simplesect.para: C-style signature: void XDpRxSs_Mst_AudioEnable(XDpRxSs *InstancePtr, u8 StreamId)

briefdescription.para: This function macro disables audio on a given stream on the main link.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function macro is the delay/sleep function for the XDpRxSs driver.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance.
is the number of microseconds to delay/sleep for.

briefdescription.para: Prevent circular inclusions by using protection macros.
1.62 Gbps link rate.
2.70 Gbps link rate.
5.40 Gbps link rate.
8.10 Gbps link rate.
Lane count of 1.
Lane count of 2.
Lane count of 4.
PHY reset and config.
PHY power down.
Number of active pixels per line (the horizontal resolution).
Number of active lines (the vertical resolution).
Maximum number of streams supported.
Maximum number of RX ports.
Number of bytes for GUID.
Timer Counter reset value.
MCDP6000 slave device.
This is the main file for Xilinx DisplayPort Receiver Subsystem driver.

detaileddescription.para: This file contains static initialization method for Xilinx DisplayPort Receiver Subsystem core.
This file contains self test function for the DisplayPort Receiver Subsystem core.
This is the header file contains macros, enum, structure and function prototypes for MCDP6000.
This file contains a set of functions to configure the MCDP6000.
This file contains interrupt related functions of Xilinx DisplayPort RX Subsystem core.
This header file contains identifiers and register-level core functions (or macros) that can be used to access the Xilinx DisplayPort Receiver Subsystem.
This file contains functions to report debug information of DisplayPort RX Subsystem sub-cores.

This file contains a minimal set of functions for the XDpRxSs driver that allow access to all of the DisplayPort Receiver Subsystem core's functionality. Please see xdprxss.h for more details of the driver.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 sha 05/18/15 Initial release. 2.00 sha 10/05/15 Added HDCP and Timer Counter support. Protected HDCP under macro number of instances. 2.00 sha 10/15/15 Generate a HPD interrupt whenever RX cable disconnect/unplug interrupt is detected. 2.00 sha 11/06/15 Modified the order of execution in TP1 callback as DP159 config for TP1 and then link bandwidth callback. 3.0 sha 02/05/16 Added support for multiple subsystems in a design. 3.0 sha 02/19/16 Added function: XDpRxSs_DownstreamReady. 3.1 als 08/08/16 Synchronize with new HDCP APIs. 3.1 als 08/08/16 Added HDCP timeout functionality. 3.1 aad 09/06/16 Updates to support 64-bit base addresses. 3.1 aad 10/17/16 Updated timer initialization 4.0 aad 11/15/16 Modified to use DP159 from dprxss driver 4.0 aad 01/20/17 Added HDCP FIFO reset for correct initialization of the FIFO 4.0 tu 05/30/17 Moved timer functions under XPAR_XHDCP_NUM_INSTANCES to solve compiler warnings 4.1 tu 09/08/17 Set Driver side three interrupt handler callback in XDpRxSs_CfgInitialize function 5.0 yas 01/28/18 Added support for DP 1.4. 5.0 jb 02/19/19 Added support for HDCP22 6.0 rg 11/19/19 Added support to use PS I2C instance too. 6.0 jb 02/14/20 The DP Rx subsystems assumes that the HDCP configuration is same for all the instances in multiple subsystems in the design. This driver won't support for different configuration of the subsystems. 6.1 rg 08/13/20 Added below list APIs related to Adaptive-Sync feature. XDpRxSs_SetAdaptiveSyncCaps XDpRxSs_MaskAdaptiveIntr XDpRxSs_UnMaskAdaptiveIntr XDpRxSs_GetVblank XDpRxSs_GetVtotal 6.1 rg 09/23/20 Added below list of APIs related to color encoding parameters, XDpRxss_GetBpc XDpRxss_GetColorComponent XDpRxss_GetColorimetry XDpRxss_GetDynamicRange 8.0 jb 01/12/22 Added clk_wizard configuration for rx_dec_clk which is required for 8b10b logic.

Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 sha 05/18/15 Initial release. 2.00 sha 10/05/15 Added HDCP support. Removed DP159 bit error count code. Used DP159 bit error count function from Video Common library. 4.00 aad 11/14/16 Modified to use DP159 from dprxss 4.01 aad 07/06/17 Added MAUD and NAUD to MSA prints.

detaileddescription.para: For more information about the operation of this core see the hardware specification and documentation in the higher level driver xdprxss.h file.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 sha 05/18/15 Initial release. 2.00 sha 10/05/15 Added Timer Counter reset value macro.

detaileddescription.para: Please see xdprxss.h for more details of the core.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 sha 05/18/15 Initial release. 2.00 sha 10/05/15 Removed setting HDCP callbacks. Added HDCP and Timer Counter interrupt handler. 3.0 sha 02/19/16 Added switch case for XDPRXSS_HANDLER_HDCP_RPTR_TDSA_EVENT to register callback with HDCP. 4.0 aad 12/01/16 Added HDCP Authentication interrupt handler 4.1 tu 09/06/17 Added three driver side interrupt handler for Video, NoVideo and PowerChange event 4.1 jb 02/19/19 Added support for HDCP22. 6.2 rg 03/25/21 Added support for adaptive-sync in MST

Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 Kei 01/23/18 Initial release. 6.0 rg 11/19/19 Modified MCDP6000 APIs to support both PS I2C and PL I2C .

Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 Kei 01/23/18 Initial release.

Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 sha 05/18/15 Initial release. 2.00 sha 10/05/15 Added HDCP and Timer Counter self test. 4.00 tu 25/06/17 Added proper return value

Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 sha 05/18/15 Initial release.
